name: ecart-pay
description: Cursor plugin for Ecart Pay integrations — OAuth connect, sandbox live MCP, auth, orders, checkouts, webhooks, SDK, and Mexico pay-ins.

ECARTPAY_PUBLIC_KEY.title: Sandbox public key
ECARTPAY_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Fallback sandbox public API key when OAuth merchant keys are not available. Prefer OAuth connect for partner integrations.

ECARTPAY_PRIVATE_KEY.title: Sandbox private key
ECARTPAY_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Fallback sandbox private API key. Never commit. Prefer OAuth connect.

ECARTPAY_BASE_URL.title: API base URL
ECARTPAY_BASE_URL.description: API host for MCP execute-request. Default sandbox.
